findings.description: Source h2 section 構成 has >= 2000 chars of plain text and contains multiple h3/h4 subsections (クラス図, 各クラスの責務, インタフェース定義, クラス定義, テーブル定義) that were not split into separate knowledge sections. All content is present but consolidated into a single section.

Source h2 section 使用方法 has >= 2000 chars of plain text and contains multiple h3/h4 subsections (SystemAccountAuthenticatorの使用方法, AuthenticaionUtilの使用方法, AuthenticationUtilの使用例) that were not split into separate knowledge sections. All content is present but consolidated into a single section.
